MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. of PARAS LAW GROUP 380-9222, appearing for plaintiff/moving party
Defendant TJX Companies, Inc. of MUNGER, TOLLES & OLSON 512-4012, appearing for defendant/opposing party

RULING:
Argued and TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories and request for production of documents is denied as moot as supplemental responses have been served. The Court makes no findings as to the adequacy of the further responses. The request for monetary sanctions is denid. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
